name: Haga Golfklubb
description:
Haga Golfklubb har 27 flotte hull. Disse deles opp i 3 sløyfer, Rød, Gul & Blå, og spilles til en hver tid som en 18-hullsbane, åpen for alle, og en 9-hullsbane, kun åpen for klubbens aksjonærer og juniorer

Course consists of 27 holes divided into 3 loops: Rød, Gul, Blå

organization.clubOrganization:
Org.nr: 983790100

Founded: 2003

Major tournaments: SAS Masters 2008 på Ladies European Tour, Norgesmesterskapet 2025

Major events:
- SAS Masters på Ladies European Tour (2008) - GUL+RØD
- Norgesmesterskapet (2025) - GUL+RØD

Designer: Henrik Jacobsen (danske) (2003)

Renovation: Johan Benestam (svenske) (2014-2017)

Renovation 2014-2017: Johan Benestam (Sverige)

facilities.drivingRangeNotes: TopTracer Range med 78 utslagsmatter under tak
facilities.simulatorType: Haga Golfsenter: 9 Trackman iO + 8 Full Swing

2025.greenFeeDescription: Prime time (helg 07:00-14:00, hverdag etter kl. 14:00): 1 100 kr. Øvrige tider: 800 kr. Gjest av aksjonær: prime time 900 kr, øvrige 600 kr. Junior: 50% på gjeldende greenfee. Kveld: 450 kr.
2025.greenFeeDescription_en: Prime time (weekend 07:00-14:00, weekday after 14:00): 1,100 kr. Other times: 800 kr. Guest of shareholder: prime time 900 kr, other 600 kr. Junior: 50% of applicable green fee. Evening: 450 kr.
2025.notes: Golfbil med EAGL keyless: medlem 18-hull 400 kr, 9-hull 250 kr. Gjest 18-hull 500 kr, 9-hull 350 kr. Med legeerklæring: medlem 18-hull 300 kr, 9-hull 250 kr, gjest 9-hull 350 kr. 10-runder pakke (medlem): 2 500 kr.
2025.notes_en: Golf cart with EAGL keyless: member 18-hole 400 kr, 9-hole 250 kr. Guest 18-hole 500 kr, 9-hole 350 kr. With medical certificate: member 18-hole 300 kr, 9-hole 250 kr, guest 9-hole 350 kr. 10-round package (member): 2,500 kr.

2026.greenFeeDescription: Prime time (helg/helligdag 07:00-14:00, hverdag etter kl. 14:00): 1 100 kr. Øvrige tider: 800 kr. Gjest av aksjonær: prime time 900 kr, øvrige 600 kr. Junior: 50% på gjeldende greenfee. Kveld: 450 kr.
2026.greenFeeDescription_en: Prime time (weekend/bank holiday 07:00-14:00, weekday after 14:00): 1,100 kr. Other times: 800 kr. Guest of shareholder: prime time 900 kr, other 600 kr. Junior: 50% of applicable green fee. Evening: 450 kr.
2026.notes: Golfbil med EAGL keyless: gjest 18-hull 500 kr, 9-hull 350 kr. Med legeerklæring: gjest 18-hull 400 kr, 9-hull 350 kr. Booking 3 dager i forveien via Gimmie-appen, Golfbox eller proshop. Forhåndsbetaling av greenfee ved booking i Golfbox.
2026.notes_en: Golf cart with EAGL keyless: guest 18-hole 500 kr, 9-hole 350 kr. With medical certificate: guest 18-hole 400 kr, 9-hole 350 kr. Book 3 days in advance via the Gimmie app, Golfbox, or pro shop. Prepayment of green fee when booking in Golfbox.

2025.name: Aksjonær
2025.description: Inkl. klubbkontingent 1 000 kr. Spillerett på Nordhaug GK. 15% rabatt simulator Haga Golfsenter.
2025.description_en: Incl. club dues 1,000 kr. Playing rights at Nordhaug GC. 15% simulator discount at Haga Golf Centre.

2025.name: Ungdom/Student 20-25 år
2025.description: Inkl. klubbkontingent 1 000 kr. Spillerett på Nordhaug GK. 15% rabatt simulator.
2025.description_en: Incl. club dues 1,000 kr. Playing rights at Nordhaug GC. 15% simulator discount.

2025.name: Greenfeemedlemskap
2025.description: Medlemskap uten fritt spill. Inkl. klubbkontingent 1 000 kr.
2025.description_en: Membership without free play. Incl. club dues 1,000 kr.

2025.name: Greenfeemedlemskap junior
2025.description: Juniormedlemskap uten fritt spill. Inkl. klubbkontingent 1 000 kr.
2025.description_en: Junior membership without free play. Incl. club dues 1,000 kr.

membershipStatus.joiningFeeNote_en: Waiting list for Junior and Youth/Student. Green Fee membership available.

images.alt_en: Aerial view of Haga Golf Club with fountains in water hazards, bunkers, clubhouse and green fairways in Bærum

images.alt_en: Golfer on fairway at Haga Golf Club with clubhouse, bunkers and forest in the background

images.alt_en: Aerial view of Haga Golf Club with bunkers, water hazards and view towards the Oslo Fjord

images.alt_en: Green with flag and fountain at Haga Golf Club with panoramic view over fairways and water hazards

images.alt_en: Clubhouse and pro shop at Haga Golf Club with glass facade, sculpture and golfers with trolley in autumn sun

description_en:
Haga Golf Club has 27 superb holes. These are divided into 3 loops: Red, Yellow, and Blue, and are played at any time as an 18-hole course open to all, plus a 9-hole course open only to the club's shareholders and juniors.

The course consists of 27 holes divided into 3 loops: Red, Yellow, Blue.
